title: Part 4 – Entraînement 4 : exposés transport, divertissement & santé
instructions: Écoutez chaque exposé, puis répondez aux trois questions.

items.audioText: Attention, passengers waiting for the Eurostar service to London. We regret to inform you that this service has been delayed by approximately forty minutes due to a signal fault on the line. The revised departure time is now eleven forty-five. Passengers are advised to remain in the departure lounge and listen for further announcements. Complimentary refreshments are available at the hospitality desk near gate seven. We apologise for the inconvenience and thank you for your patience.

questions.prompt: Why has the service been delayed?
choices: A signal fault on the line
A mechanical issue with the train
questions.explanation: "due to a signal fault on the line".

questions.prompt: What is the revised departure time?
questions.explanation: "The revised departure time is now eleven forty-five".

questions.prompt: What is available near gate seven?
choices: A shuttle bus to the platform
questions.explanation: "Complimentary refreshments are available at the hospitality desk near gate seven".

items.audioText: Good morning, and welcome aboard the express bus service to the city centre. This journey takes approximately thirty-five minutes under normal traffic conditions. Our next stop will be the Central Business District, followed by the University, and then the final stop at the Airport Terminal Two. If you need to purchase or validate your ticket, please do so now using the machine at the front of the bus. Passengers travelling with bicycles are reminded that bikes must be folded and stored in the designated area at the rear.

questions.prompt: How long does the journey take under normal conditions?
questions.explanation: "This journey takes approximately thirty-five minutes under normal traffic conditions".

questions.prompt: What is the final stop?
questions.explanation: "the final stop at the Airport Terminal Two".

questions.prompt: Where must bicycles be stored on the bus?
choices: In the designated area at the rear
In the luggage compartment under the bus
questions.explanation: "bikes must be folded and stored in the designated area at the rear".

items.audioText: Good morning, and welcome to the Grand Tour of Bordeaux. My name is Sophie, and I'll be your guide for the next two hours. We'll begin here at the Grand Théâtre, one of the finest examples of neoclassical architecture in France. From there, we'll walk along the waterfront to the famous Miroir d'Eau, before heading up to the old town for a tasting at a traditional wine merchant. Please stay together as a group and feel free to ask questions at any point. Our tour ends at the Place de la Bourse at approximately noon.

questions.prompt: How long will the tour last?
questions.explanation: "I'll be your guide for the next two hours".

questions.prompt: What will visitors do in the old town?
choices: Have a tasting at a wine merchant
questions.explanation: "heading up to the old town for a tasting at a traditional wine merchant".

questions.prompt: Where does the tour end?
choices: At the Place de la Bourse
questions.explanation: "Our tour ends at the Place de la Bourse at approximately noon".

items.audioText: Hello and welcome to this week's edition of Business Horizons, the podcast for professionals on the move. I'm your host, James Leroy. In today's episode, we'll be speaking with three entrepreneurs who built successful companies without any external funding. We'll also be discussing the latest trends in remote team management and how companies can maintain culture across multiple time zones. Today's episode is sponsored by WorkNest, a platform for remote team collaboration. You can find the link in the show notes. Let's get started.

questions.prompt: What is the podcast mainly for?
questions.explanation: "Business Horizons, the podcast for professionals on the move".

questions.prompt: What is one of the topics covered in today's episode?
questions.explanation: "the latest trends in remote team management".

questions.prompt: What is WorkNest?
questions.explanation: "WorkNest, a platform for remote team collaboration".

items.audioText: Good afternoon, and thank you for attending today's webinar on workplace mental health. Over the next sixty minutes, we'll be covering three key areas: recognising early signs of burnout, practical strategies for stress management, and how organisations can build a culture of psychological safety. There will be a Q&A session at the end. Please type your questions in the chat box throughout the presentation. Slides will be shared with all registered participants after the session. If you cannot stay for the full webinar, a recording will be available within twenty-four hours.

questions.prompt: How long is the webinar?
questions.explanation: "Over the next sixty minutes".

questions.prompt: How should participants submit questions?
choices: By typing in the chat box
By submitting them before the webinar
questions.explanation: "Please type your questions in the chat box throughout the presentation".

questions.prompt: When will the recording be available?
questions.explanation: "a recording will be available within twenty-four hours".

items.audioText: This is an announcement from the corporate travel desk. Due to a public transport strike in Paris this Friday, all employees travelling to our Paris office should plan for significant delays. We strongly advise booking taxi or ride-share services in advance, as demand will be very high. Alternatively, if your meetings can be conducted remotely, please coordinate with your Paris colleagues to shift to video conferencing. Employees who need to travel and incur higher transport costs due to the strike may claim these as exceptional expenses with a note in their expense report.

questions.prompt: What is causing travel disruptions on Friday?
choices: A public transport strike in Paris
questions.explanation: "a public transport strike in Paris this Friday".

questions.prompt: What does the desk strongly advise?
choices: Flying instead of taking the train
Booking taxis or ride-shares in advance
questions.explanation: "We strongly advise booking taxi or ride-share services in advance".

questions.prompt: How should extra transport costs due to the strike be claimed?
choices: By submitting a separate claim form
As exceptional expenses with a note in the expense report
questions.explanation: "may claim these as exceptional expenses with a note in their expense report".

items.audioText: Welcome to the NovaMed Health Clinic. If you're calling to book an appointment, please press one. For test results, press two. For prescriptions and repeat medication, press three. To speak with a nurse, press four. Our clinic is open Monday to Friday from eight a.m. to seven p.m., and Saturday from nine to one p.m. We are closed on Sundays and public holidays. If you are experiencing a medical emergency, please hang up and dial one-one-two. For non-urgent out-of-hours advice, you can reach our nurse helpline on zero eight hundred two hundred three hundred.

questions.prompt: Which number should a caller press to book an appointment?
questions.explanation: "If you're calling to book an appointment, please press one".

questions.prompt: What are the clinic's Saturday hours?
questions.explanation: "Saturday from nine to one p.m."

questions.prompt: What should callers do in a medical emergency?
choices: Press zero to speak to a nurse immediately
Stay on hold for priority treatment
questions.explanation: "please hang up and dial one-one-two".

items.audioText: Good evening, and welcome to the Greenfield Music Festival. Tonight's main stage will open at seven p.m. with local act The Copper Line, followed at nine by headliner Mara Stone. The festival site has three food courts and two licensed bars. Please note that the northern bar will close at eleven p.m. due to a local noise ordinance. Lost property should be reported to the information tent near the main entrance. The last shuttle bus back to the city centre departs at midnight. We hope you enjoy the evening.

questions.prompt: What time does the main stage open?
questions.explanation: "Tonight's main stage will open at seven p.m."

questions.prompt: Why will the northern bar close at eleven p.m.?
choices: Due to a local noise ordinance
questions.explanation: "the northern bar will close at eleven p.m. due to a local noise ordinance".

questions.prompt: When does the last shuttle bus leave?
questions.explanation: "The last shuttle bus back to the city centre departs at midnight".

items.audioText: Hello, this is a reminder from Vitacare Pharmacy. Your prescription for blood pressure medication is ready for collection. You can pick it up at any time during our opening hours, which are Monday to Friday eight a.m. to eight p.m., and weekends ten a.m. to four p.m. Please bring your prescription card when you collect. If you're unable to collect in person, we offer a home delivery service for a small fee of three euros fifty. To request delivery, please call us back on this number or visit our website at www.vitacarepharmacy.com.

questions.prompt: What is ready for collection?
choices: A prescription for blood pressure medication
questions.explanation: "Your prescription for blood pressure medication is ready for collection".

questions.prompt: What must the patient bring when collecting?
questions.explanation: "Please bring your prescription card when you collect".

questions.prompt: How much does home delivery cost?
questions.explanation: "home delivery service for a small fee of three euros fifty".

items.audioText: Good morning. This is a brief announcement from the building management team. In preparation for next week's fire safety inspection, a full fire evacuation drill will take place this Thursday at ten a.m. When the alarm sounds, all employees must leave the building immediately using the nearest fire exit and assemble at their designated muster point. Do not use the lifts. Please make sure you know your muster point — they are listed on the safety notice boards on each floor. The drill should last no longer than fifteen minutes. Your cooperation is appreciated.

questions.prompt: Why is the drill being held this Thursday?
choices: It is a routine monthly exercise
In preparation for a fire safety inspection
As required by a new safety regulation
questions.explanation: "In preparation for next week's fire safety inspection".

questions.prompt: What should employees NOT do during the evacuation?
questions.explanation: "Do not use the lifts".

questions.prompt: Where can employees find their muster point?
choices: On the safety notice boards on each floor
questions.explanation: "they are listed on the safety notice boards on each floor".
